# Ham

> Ham - A campus life assistant app for Wuhan University (WHU).

Documentation

## Table of Contents

- [About](/about.md): About Ham, security, privacy, and open-source status.
- [Brand Assets](/developers/open-platform/brand-assets.md): Official Ham icons, brand colors, and usage guidelines.
- [Campus Bus](/handbook/bus.md): View real-time campus bus arrival information.
- [CAS Authentication Module](/developers/ham-rn/cas.md): CAS authentication module for WHU information portal login.
- [Courses](/handbook/course.md): How to add, edit, delete, and import courses in Ham.
- [Developers](/developers.md): Overview of Ham developer projects and documentation.
- [Download](/download.md): Download Ham for iOS and Android.
- [Education Module](/developers/ham-rn/education.md): Education module for fetching course schedules and grades.
- [Enable Automation](/handbook/automatic.md): Enable automation features like library auto-booking.
- [Feedback](/handbook/bugfix.md): How to report bugs and provide feedback.
- [Grades](/handbook/score.md): View grades, calculate GPA, and check grade distributions.
- [Ham Connect](/developers/open-platform.md): Ham Connect SSO platform overview and capabilities.
- [Ham React Native Components](/developers/ham-rn.md): Ham React Native component library for campus features.
- [Ham Web](/developers/ham-web.md): Ham Web frontend architecture and features.
- [Introduction](/handbook.md): Introduction to Ham and its features.
- [Library](/handbook/library.md): How to use Ham for library seat reservations.
- [Login Button Source Code](/developers/open-platform/login-button.md): Multi-platform Login with Ham button components (Vue, React, React Native, Android, iOS, HTML/CSS).
- [Luojia E-Card](/handbook/pay.md): Quick access to Luojia E-Card campus payment QR code.
- [OAuth 2.0 Full Integration Guide](/developers/open-platform/oauth2-guide.md): Step-by-step guide to integrate Ham SSO via OAuth2.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy.md): Ham privacy policy - data collection, storage, and usage.
- [Schedule](/handbook/schedule.md): Manage schedule items with due-date reminders and calendar sync.
- [Score Calculator Module](/developers/ham-rn/score-calc.md): GPA and credit calculation utilities using custom JavaScript scripts.
- [Sports Facilities](/handbook/sport.md): How to book sports facilities with Ham.
- [SSO OAuth2 Authorization](/developers/ham-web/sso-authorize.md): SSO OAuth2 authorization flow and API reference for Ham Web.
- [Status](/handbook/status.md): Status page showing today's tasks, weather, library reservations, and classes.
- [User Agreement](/privacy/user-policy.md): Ham user agreement - terms of service.
- [User Center](/handbook/user-center.md): Manage your Ham account and settings.
